thesis: Build-A-Bear is not a dying mall retailer for 4-year-olds. It is a high-recognition brand with a loyal and growing ADULT fan base (kidults) — comparable to Warhammer collectors. This tracker measures whether adult demand is real, growing, and durable, using multiple independent social signals.
subtitle: Independent social-demand signals on the adult Build-A-Bear fandom
signal_convergence_note: No single platform proves a fandom. When Google search, Reddit community size, TikTok culture, and the resale market all point the same way at the same time, platform-specific noise is ruled out and broad-based adult demand is confirmed.
status: MVP — KPI cards use real cited figures; time-series charts are seeded illustratively and are replaced with live data when the collector scripts in /scripts are run.
